'''Mykes''' were [[Near-Human]]s under the rule of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. [[Norym Kim]], a member of the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends#The "Council of Blood"|Imperial Interim Ruling Council]], was a Myke.

{{Species-stub}}

==Biology and appearance==
[[File:Myke1.jpg|thumb|left|Norym Kim]]
Mykes closely resembled [[Human/Legends|Humans]], with the exception of a fairly pale complexion and facial differences. Their hair was often a shade of black or dark brown, with eye colors typically ranging anywhere from dark blue to dark purple, dark green, dark brown or dark gray. The species had distinctive fleshy "chin tufts" at the sides of their chins, giving them their unique look.
==Culture==
They spoke the [[Myke (language)|Myke language]] and their writing system was similar to the [[Common Sith]] alphabet.<Ref>{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/source/writtenword/index.html?page=1|text=The Written Word|int=The Written Word}}</ref>
